text.title: Multi-Touch Attribution Modeling Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for Multi-Touch Attribution Modeling. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate to the next step.

step.name: inventory-inputs
step.input: task brief, prior artefact (if any), source-of-truth access
step.action: Collect inputs named in AGENTS.md Prerequisites table; verify access; capture timestamps.
step.output: Inputs index with source citations; access blockers surfaced.
step.decision-gate: All inputs reachable? If no -> skip per AGENTS.md Skip If.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: Walk each rule in `01-core-rules.xml`. Verify each is satisfied. Note violations.
step.decision-gate: Any rule-violation that blocks the methodology? If yes -> skip OR remediate before continuing.

step.name: walk-decision-tree
step.action: Open `06-decision-tree.xml`. Evaluate root question and traverse branches until a `<conclusion>` is reached.
step.output: Decision-record-style note: branch path + conclusion + rule id referenced.
step.decision-gate: Decision = skip-this-methodology? If yes -> log skip reason and exit. Else -> continue.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.action: Draft per `02-output-contract.xml`. Fill schema-required fields. Anchor every non-trivial field to >= 1 evidence entry.
step.output: Draft artefact (JSON or Markdown sidecar matching schema).
step.decision-gate: All required fields populated? Evidence cited? If no -> iterate.

step.name: validate-and-handoff
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-multi-touch-attribution-modeling.py --file <artefact>`. Resolve violations. Set status to ready_for_review. Notify named consumer.
step.output: Validator OK + status=ready_for_review + handoff note delivered.
step.decision-gate: Validator exit 0? Consumer acknowledged? If no -> fix and re-validate.
